'''Froswythe''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It was a major source of meat and animal-based textiles for the Colonies and [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Roaming herds of livestock included [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]] and [[Nerf/Legends|nerfs]]. [[Ycaqt]] were used for transportation.

Its sparsely-populated rolling prairies were home to bandit hideaways and tourist-oriented ranches, where livestock had to be guarded against indigenous [[plains panther]]s.

During the [[New Jedi Order era]], Core World criminal [[Fegred Ewd]] had a hideaway on Froswythe, and [[Jerren Durs]] owned a leisure ranch called [[Durs Ranch]].

{{Planet-stub}}
